---
title: Welcome to Be Not Deceived
date: 2017-10-15
categories: [Welcome]
---

---

### Welcome to Be Not Deceived!

Welcome!!! I am very glad you're here

I invite you to read [Why 'Be Not Deceived'.](http://benotdeceived.org/)  This page outlines the purpose of Be Not Deceived and the Biblical text which is the basis for which I started the blog.

I do hope you will stop by once I have created more content.

Thank you for stopping by Be Not Deceived!
